name: stock-watch-cn
description: A lightweight Windows stock watcher for China's mainland markets.
author: Codex

scripts.package:win: electron-packager . YinPan --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --overwrite --out=dist --asar --prune=true --ignore="^/(dist|YinPan-win32-x64|outputs|scripts|\.git|\.idea)$" --ignore="^/YinPan-win32-x64\.zip$" --ignore="^/package-lock\.json$" --ignore="^/(package-win|一键打包)\.bat$" --ignore="^/README\.md$" --ignore="^/node_modules/\.cache$" && node scripts/trim-package.js dist/YinPan-win32-x64
